pricing.headline: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subheadline: Start for free — upgrade when you need unlimited access
pricing.faq_1_a: Yes — cancel from your billing portal and you keep access until the end of the billing period
pricing.faq_2_a: Your profile is stored locally in your browser — conversations are not saved to our servers
pricing.faq_3_a: All major credit and debit cards via Stripe — iDEAL available for Dutch bank accounts
